base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_layout_template — a ui (hud_readout) from 1985 super mario bros. Heads-up-display composition template — strip at top of screen showing Player Name / Coin Count / Level Name / World Indicator / Time Timer fields. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Heads-up-display composition template — strip at top of screen showing Player Name / Coin Count / Level Name / World Indicator / Time Timer fields; static layout rendered via tile-based HUD row
